title: Reverse transcription of complementary DNA
steps: Obtain an RNase -free microcentrifuge tube 400 µL Add the following components in the described order: -Water 15 µL -10 X Buffer 2 µL, 50 mM Tris-acetate, 75 mM Potassium Acetate, 8 mM Magnesium Acetate, 10 mM DTT (pH 8.3) -5'-P32 Radiolabeled DNA 1 µL, -RNA 2 µL, app. 2 pmol
Place the tube in a heat block at 90 °C and turn off the heat block to allow for slow cooling. 02:00:00
Remove the tube upon reaching room temperature and centrifuge for 00:00:05 using a microcentrifuge
The solution is then transferred to a separate microcentrifuge tube 3 µL
Add the desired dNTP solution 1 µL 10 millimolar (mM)

Add the reverse transcriptase solution 2 µL . The reverse transcriptase solution consits of RT 2 µL dissolved in water 58 µL . This enzyme was purchased from NEB. AMV Reverse Transcriptase - 1,000 units New England Biolabs Catalog #M0277L
Place the solution in an incubator at 37 °C for 00:45:00
Remove from water bath and add urea 7 µL 6 Molarity (M)
Place the tube in a heat block at 90 °C for 00:10:00
Centrifuge for 00:00:05 using a microcentrifuge while allowing to cool to rt
Withdraw the solution 8 µL, This typically accounts for app 4000 cpm and load onto a denaturing 20 % PAGE
On a separate well, add a marker composed of xylene cyanol and bromophenol blue in 90% formamide buffer
Turn on the power supply and allow to run until the bromophenol blue marker is 3/4 down the gel. Settings will vary depending on the gel size and thicknes.
Remove the gel from the gel stand and remove one glass slide.
Develop using an autoradiography cassette Overnight
Visualize and quantify the gel using a Molecular Dynamics Phosphorimager 840

Repeat all steps above, except with the amount of reverse transcriptase added. Add the reverse transcriptase solution 2 µL . The reverse transcriptase solution consits of RT 1 µL dissolved in water 10 µL . This enzyme was purchased from NEB M0253L at 200,000 U/mL

Repeat all steps above, except with the amount of reverse transcriptase added. Add the reverse transcriptase solution 2 µL . The reverse transcriptase solution consits of RT 0.75 µL dissolved in water 1.5 mL ; followed by a second 1:1 dilution in water. This enzyme was purchased from Worthtington LS05003 at 27.5 units/uL
creator: Marino Resendiz
